subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken thou once again to the Call of the One, the Single One. Verily, He maketh mention of thee, as a bounty from Him, in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد ان استمع ندآء الفرد الاحد مره اخری انه یذکرک فضلا من عنده فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @humility; meekness; lowliness
